role_admin_desc: Full access plus the ability to invite other members
role_analyst_desc: Read and write access to business data and insights
role_accountant_desc: Access to financial reports, CFO Mode, and margin data
role_buyer_desc: Access to inventory, supply chain, and stock data
role_viewer_desc: Read-only access to dashboards and reports
error_wrong_user: You are logged in as {email} but this invite is for {inviteEmail}. Please sign out first.
expired_desc: This invitation link has expired or is invalid. Ask your team admin to send a new invite.
done_desc: Welcome to AskBiz. Taking you to your workspace now…
review_desc: Accept this invitation to join AskBiz as a team member.
